name: qa-hu-template
description: Template Universal QA - Shift-Left Testing (E2E, API, Performance, Security)

scripts.k6:reset: curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8086/query?q=DROP+DATABASE+k6" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8086/query?q=CREATE+DATABASE+k6" && echo K6 metrics reset OK
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['reports','allure-results','.api-captures','.temp-k6','.temp-newman'].forEach(d=>{if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Deleted:',d)})" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8086/query?q=DROP+DATABASE+k6" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8086/query?q=CREATE+DATABASE+k6" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8086/query?q=DROP+DATABASE+qa_metrics" && curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8086/query?q=CREATE+DATABASE+qa_metrics" && echo All metrics databases reset OK

author: QA Team
